# 27Tools

> 27Tools is a growing collection of fast, simple browser-based utility tools.

## Summary

27Tools publishes lightweight online tools that are designed to work quickly in a modern browser. Current tools include PNG to WEBP conversion, Sony shutter count lookup, Canon shutter count lookup from original CR3 files, Nikon shutter count lookup from original NEF files, HEX to RGB with Pantone-style colour matching, and Unix timestamp conversion. The main site also includes About and Privacy pages that explain the project and data handling.

## Tools

- [PNG to WEBP](https://27tools.co/tools/png-to-webp/) Convert PNG images to WEBP in the browser with batch support and quality control.
- [Sony Shutter Count Tool](https://27tools.co/tools/camera-shutter-count/) Read Sony shutter count metadata from an original JPG or ARW file in the browser.
- [Canon Shutter Count Tool](https://27tools.co/tools/canon-shutter-count/) Read Canon shutter count metadata from an original CR3 file in the browser while keeping a full metadata viewer available.
- [Nikon Shutter Count Tool](https://27tools.co/tools/nikon-shutter-count/) Read Nikon shutter count metadata from an original NEF file in the browser while keeping a full metadata viewer available.
- [HEX to RGB and Pantone](https://27tools.co/tools/hex-to-rgb-to-pantone/) Convert HEX colours to RGB and compare the closest Pantone-style matches.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://27tools.co/tools/timestamp-converter/) Convert Unix timestamps to readable dates, convert dates back to epoch values, and compare common durations in seconds and milliseconds.

## Site Pages

- [Home](https://27tools.co/) Main index page for the tool collection.
- [About 27Tools](https://27tools.co/about/) Background on the project and its goals.
- [Privacy Policy](https://27tools.co/privacy/) Privacy and analytics details for the site and tools.

## Machine-Readable Signals

- [Sitemap](https://27tools.co/sitemap.xml) Canonical sitemap of key public URLs.
- [Schema Graph](https://27tools.co/schema.json) Aggregated JSON-LD graph describing the website, organization, and tool pages.
- [LLMs Full](https://27tools.co/llms-full.txt) Expanded AI-readable catalog with more page and tool detail.
- [Robots](https://27tools.co/robots.txt) Crawl guidance for bots and search engines.
